description: Pharmaverse AE records with varied violation counts (0-5 per case), including true clean records.

cases.task_description: Identify every terminology or formatting violation in this SDTM AE record. Return a JSON object with key 'violations'. Not every field is wrong — only report actual violations.
cases.study_context:
Study: CT-ONC-201 ÔÇö Phase 2 Oncology Study (Solid Tumours)
Sponsor: Veritas Pharmaceuticals

PROTOCOL / SAP RULES FOR AE DOMAIN (Section 9.1, Appendix B):
- AESTDTC: ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD. Partial dates are NOT permitted in CT-ONC-201.
- AESEV: CDISC CT ÔÇö exactly MILD, MODERATE, or SEVERE (uppercase). NCI CTCAE grade descriptions (e.g., 'Grade 2') are not valid.
- AESER: exactly Y or N. Free-text responses (Yes, No, TRUE, FALSE) are not acceptable per FDA guidance.
- AEREL: CT-ONC-201 uses sponsor-defined causality terminology (ICD v3.0, Appendix B):
    Valid values: PROBABLE, POSSIBLE, REMOTE, NONE, NA
    Do NOT apply standard CDISC AEREL values (RELATED, NOT RELATED) ÔÇö this sponsor uses a finer-grained scale.
    Mapping guide: 'Probably Related' -> PROBABLE | 'Possibly Related' -> POSSIBLE | 'Remote' -> REMOTE | 'None' -> NONE
- AEOUT: one of RECOVERED/RESOLVED, NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED, RECOVERED/RESOLVED WITH SEQUELAE, FATAL, UNKNOWN
    Common errors: 'Resolved' -> RECOVERED/RESOLVED | 'Not Recovered' -> NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED

HARD CASE NOTE: All five reportable fields in this record contain errors. Apply each rule systematically.

violations.issue: Date not in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD
Severity not in controlled terminology (must be MILD, MODERATE, or SEVERE)
Serious event flag must be Y or N
Relationship value not in expected sponsor terminology
Outcome value not in controlled terminology

SPONSOR NOTE (Oncology context): Baseline disease symptoms (e.g., fatigue, nausea from pre-existing condition) should NOT be coded as new AEs unless documented as worsening. A record where all fields already conform to the rules above is a CLEAN record ÔÇö return violations: [].

CLEAN RECORD NOTE: This record was submitted by a site that followed the CT-ONC-201-specific AEREL terminology correctly. Verify each field before flagging.
